headline: Liftoff Welcomes Former J.D. Power CEO, Dave Habiger and Former Apple Controller, Betsy Rafael to its Board of Directors
summary: Liftoff, a global leader in performance marketing and monetization solutions for the mobile app economy, today announced the recent appointment of Dave Habiger and Elizabeth "Betsy" Rafael to its board of directors.

headline: Jim Cramer on Boston Scientific: “I Think They Can Come Back”
summary: Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE:BSX) was among the stocks Jim Cramer covered on Mad Money as he discussed the wave of IPOs being the market’s possible biggest threat. Answering a caller’s query about the stock, Cramer commented: Well, the competition just got too strong for Boston Scientific. They’re always one step out of the posse, and […]
